## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter (`name`, `description`, `tools`, `model`) is present and valid
- [ ] Agent declares scope enforcement before any target-touching action
- [ ] Added / updated row in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)
- [ ] Added / updated row in [README.md](../README.md) catalog
- [ ] Added entry under `[Unreleased]` in [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md)
- [ ] No emojis, no real targets, no real credentials
- [ ] `./install.sh --target claude --dry-run` still succeeds
